mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO viewed_profiles (viewer_id, viewed_id) VALUES (#{viewerId}, #{viewedId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, gm.group_nickname AS groupNickname, u.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, u.gender, u.birth_year AS birthYear, VEC_DISTANCE( (SELECT taste_vector FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id = #{myUserId}), up.taste_vector ) AS similarityScore, mf.music_id AS musicId, mf.track_name AS trackName, mf.artist_name AS artistName, a.album_name AS albumName, a.album_cover_url AS albumCoverUrl FROM users u JOIN group_members gm ON gm.user_id = u.user_id AND gm.group_id = #{groupId} JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_fav_music ufm ON ufm.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN music_features mf ON mf.music_id = ufm.music_id LEFT JOIN albums a ON a.album_id = mf.album_id WHERE u.user_id != #{myUserId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{myUserId} THEN f.receiver_id ELSE f.requester_id END FROM friendships f WHERE f.status = 'ACCEPTED' AND (f.requester_id = #{myUserId} OR f.receiver_id = #{myUserId}) ) AND u.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT viewed_id FROM viewed_profiles WHERE viewer_id = #{myUserId} ) AND (SELECT taste_vector FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id = #{myUserId}) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY similarityScore ASC, u.user_id ASC, ufm.fav_id ASC
